recentAddition: FlashAttention (Dao et al., NeurIPS 2022) - Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact Attention with IO-Awareness. IO-aware attention algorithm using tiling to reduce GPU HBM-SRAM memory transfers by 20x. First method to enable exact attention on 64K sequence lengths without approximation. Training speedup: BERT-large 15%, GPT-2 3x, Long Range Arena 2.4x. 7,000+ citations.
